criteria.test_accuracy: Tests correctly validate expected behavior with precise assertions (1=wrong assertions or false passes, 5=precise and meaningful)
criteria.failure_analysis: Root cause identification for test failures (1=reports error message only, 5=identifies root cause with explanation)
criteria.coverage_improvement: Meaningful coverage gains targeting important paths (1=trivial tests only, 5=covers edge cases and error paths)
criteria.iteration: Effective fix-rerun cycles that converge on passing tests (1=gives up after first failure, 5=persistent and systematic)
